title: B403 CANCELLED Rebate for Fuel Charge Paid in Error - Canada.ca
content:
## B403 CANCELLED Rebate for Fuel Charge Paid in Error
This form was cancelled as of October 28, 2024 and is no longer available.
Note: If you are requesting a rebate for charges reported on one or more previously filed fuel charge returns, please submit amended B400 returns for the periods you reported the charges.
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
